extraction_reasoning: The litigation table has separate “By” and “Against” rows: I excluded the Company’s 309 criminal proceedings filed by it, and counted only “Against our Company” for regulatory proceedings (2); the Directors’ 2 tax proceedings and 1 material civil litigation are personal matters and excluded from company-group totals, while all promoter “Against” rows are nil. Tax proceedings against the Company are explicitly “-” (0), and the quantified amount against the Company is ₹1.35 million; there are no subsidiary rows or quantified subsidiary matters, so the aggregate against-company/subsidiaries amount is ₹1.35 million = ₹0.135 crore. No contingent-liabilities table or stated total is disclosed in this risk section, so the contingent-liabilities figure and date are unavailable. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage is disclosed; the stated currency source unit for the litigation table is ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
